summary.agent_text: I3 first-time review (sourceless initial lift, 2026-05-06). Bundle paper_draft.tex contains only TODO placeholders (abstract + introduction) plus a single empty lift-section heading (Phase 6o W3b Itô + LDP-α + LDP-β substrate, sourced from non-existent _phase6o_W3b_lean_only). 2 sentences walked, both UNGROUNDED (TODO placeholders awaiting drafting). No substantive prose to verify against the I3 anchor list. All 5 anchor categories (first-of-its-kind formalization claims, Mathlib substrate consumption, reproducibility, LDPCompatibleSKEFT typeclass cross-bridges, Mathlib upstream coordination integrity) are NOT YET ASSERTED in prose, so cannot drift; will require full re-review once content is drafted in Phase 6o.ζ wave.

blocking_issues.summary: I3 bundle paper_draft.tex has no substantive prose — only TODO placeholders for abstract and introduction, plus a single empty lift-section heading. Bundle is at sourceless-initial-lift state (Phase 7 absorption Session 1, 2026-05-06); 12 Lean modules referenced in append_log.json (Itô.{StochasticIntegral, QuadraticVariation, Semimartingale, ItoIsometry, ItoLemma, Novikov} + LDP.{CramerIID, Sanov, Contraction, CramerLowerBound, Varadhan, LDPCompatibleSKEFT}) but no prose claims connect to them yet. Bundle cannot reach Stage-13 readiness until prose is drafted.

non_blocking_followups.summary: Source paper folder papers/_phase6o_W3b_lean_only/ does not exist on filesystem, despite source_manifest.md and append_log.json referencing it as the source of the §1 lift. This is consistent with the I3 sourceless-initial-lift design (Phase 6o.ζ Lean module synthesis, no per-paper substrate; analogous to I2's lean-tensor-categories framing). Once Phase 6o.ζ wave produces draft prose, re-run claims-reviewer to verify the 5 I3 anchors against drafted text.

Anchor 1 (first-of-its-kind formalization claims): When prose is drafted, each 'first formalization in any proof assistant' claim for stochastic integral, quadratic variation, Itô's lemma, Novikov, Cramér, Sanov, Varadhan must cite a literature search confirming no prior Lean/Coq/Isabelle/HOL Light/Mizar formalization exists. Pre-flag for QI candidate qi-firstclaimverification.

Anchor 2 (Mathlib substrate consumed): Drafted prose must trace Brownian-motion claims to Degenne et al. arXiv:2511.20118, Doob martingales to Ying-Degenne 2022, Markov kernels to Marion 2025, sub-Gaussian variables to named upstream Mathlib commits. Currently no such citations exist in paper_draftNotes.bib.

Anchor 3 (Reproducibility): Each of the 12 Lean modules in append_log.json must build (no sorry except documented stubs in SORRY_GAPS); Mathlib upstream coordination memo's PR list must be live. Verification deferred until prose is drafted.

Anchor 4 (LDPCompatibleSKEFT typeclass cross-bridge): Claims about D3/D5/E1 downstream consumers of LDPCompatibleSKEFT must trace to specific Lean theorems in those modules that explicitly invoke the typeclass. Cross-bundle consistency check via cluster_bundle_index.json deferred.

Anchor 5 (Mathlib upstream coordination integrity): Claims about coordination with Degenne/Marion must trace to actual Zulip/GitHub coordination artifacts (not unilateral assertions). Deferred until prose is drafted.
